message:
feat(restore_scrollback): Cx-first inject_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add `ScrollbackInjector::inject_with_cx(cx, pane_id_map, scrollbacks)`
Cx-first sibling of `ScrollbackInjector::inject`. Two checkpoint seams:

1. Pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` gates the injection before the
   InjectionGuard is installed and any send_text calls fire.
2. Per-pane `cx.checkpoint()?` between iterations makes cancellation
   responsive for multi-pane restorations where each pane may emit
   many send_text chunks with inter-chunk sleeps.

Returns the partial `InjectionReport` gathered so far on cancellation
(wrapped in `crate::Result`) — callers can inspect which panes did
land before shutdown. Legacy `inject` path is preserved unchanged.

Regression test `inject_with_cx_matches_legacy` pins shape parity on
a 2-pane id-mapped injection: success_count == 2, failure_count == 0,
skipped empty, total_bytes > 0.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target): 52/52 restore_scrollback tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
